title: ZYME, enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Oct 16 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that ZYME's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron A.I.dvisor backtested 70 similar cases where ZYME's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 60 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 86%. Current price $45.35 crossed the support line at $45.26 and is trading between $47.59 resistance and $45.26 support lines. Throughout the month of 09/16/20 - 10/16/20, the price experienced a +11% Uptrend, while the week of 10/09/20 - 10/16/20 shows a -2% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/ffft117zy3u51.png?width=1448&format=png&auto=webp&s=62a25ca8230392d051a673c78da4d6accbf4be32

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on October 16, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on ZYME as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 60 of 70 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

ZYME moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 10, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for ZYME crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on September 10, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 10 of 13 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

Following a +3.61% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ZYME advanced for three days, in 174 of 208 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 128 of 154 cases where ZYME Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 83%.
